description: Abstract guidance tones for the Moss concept.

guide.description: Quiet structural rail for indent guides and whitespace hints.

guideActive.description: Raised structural rail for the currently active indent band.

whitespace.description: Dormant whitespace cue aligned with the quiet guide rail.

bracketWarm.description: Primary hot bracket rung tied to the live accent band.

bracketBright.description: Secondary bright bracket rung built from the yellow-green signal family.

bracketCool.description: Cool bracket rung that keeps nested structure distinct from warm pressure.

bracketMatchFill.description: Soft bracket-match wash built from the primary bracket rung.

bracketMatchStroke.description: Bracket-match stroke emphasis built from the same warm rung with a stronger edge.

guideInk.description: Readable guidance ink for the active line number and focused scaffold labels.
